exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Lead compound for Legs B. Hip hinge, bar close to legs. Stretch hamstrings, not lower back.

exercises.name: Walking Lunges
exercises.notes: 12 reps each leg. Torso upright, front knee tracks over toes. Per-hand weight.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Curl heel toward glute, slow 3s eccentric. Don't let hips rise off the pad.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Pause 1s at top. Controlled descent — quads do the work, not momentum.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Seated targets soleus more than standing. Full range, hold 1s stretch at bottom.
